questions.text: What will the disbelievers wish for on the Day of Judgment as mentioned in Verse 2?
questions.answer: They will intensely wish that they had been Muslims.

questions.text: What famous guarantee does Allah give regarding the Quran in Verse 9?
questions.answer: Indeed, it is We who sent down the message (Dhikr) and indeed, We will be its guardian.

questions.text: How did the disbelievers mock the Prophet (SAW) regarding revelation?
questions.answer: They called him 'mad' (Majnun) and asked why he didn't bring angels to them.

questions.text: What are the 'Buruj' mentioned in the sky?
questions.answer: Great constellations or stars that Allah has beautified for the observers.

questions.text: How does Allah protect the heavens from every 'accused devil'?
questions.answer: By a piercing flame (Shihab) that pursues any who try to eavesdrop.

questions.text: From what material did Allah create humans (Adam)?
questions.answer: From clay (Salsal) from altered black mud (Ham'-im-Masnun).

questions.text: From what was the Jinn (Iblis) created?
questions.answer: Before man, from scorching fire (Nar-is-Samum).

questions.text: Why did Iblis refuse to prostrate to Adam?
questions.answer: He argued he would not prostrate to a human created from clay/mud, showing his arrogance.

questions.text: What respite did Allah grant Iblis?
questions.answer: He was granted a delay until the Day of the time well-known (Judgment Day).

questions.text: What did Iblis vow to do to mankind?
questions.answer: To make disobedience attractive to them on earth and mislead them all.

questions.text: Who are the only ones Iblis admitted he could not mislead?
questions.answer: The 'Mukhlaseen' (chosen/sincere servants of Allah).

questions.text: How many gates does Hell have?
questions.answer: Seven gates, with a specific group assigned to each.

questions.text: How is the state of the believers' hearts in Paradise described?
questions.answer: Allah will remove whatever resentment is in their breasts, making them brothers on thrones facing each other.

questions.text: What was the reaction of Ibrahim's (AS) wife when she was told she would have a son?
questions.answer: The angels told her not to despair, for none despairs of the mercy of his Lord except the misguided.

questions.text: Who were the 'People of the Wood' (Aykah)?
questions.answer: The people of Prophet Shu'ayb who were also destroyed for their wrongdoing.

questions.text: What were the houses of the people of Al-Hijr carved out of?
questions.answer: They carved their houses out of the mountains, feeling secure.

questions.text: What is the 'Sab'an minal Mathani' (Seven of the oft-repeated) referred to in Verse 87?
questions.answer: Surah Al-Fatiha.

questions.text: How should the Prophet (SAW) deal with those who mock him?
questions.answer: By glorifying the praise of his Lord and being among those who prostrate.

questions.text: What does Allah say about the 'heaviness' in the Prophet's chest due to their speech?
questions.answer: He acknowledges that He knows the Prophet's chest is constrained by what they say.

questions.text: Until when is the believer commanded to worship Allah?
questions.answer: Until 'Al-Yaqin' (the certainty), which means until death.
